heading: Heat and light for Young Men’s Christian Association buildings
label: 8780 Heat and light for Young Men’s Christian Association buildings
text: The Secretary of the Navy may furnish, without charge, heat and light to any building of the Young Men’s Christian Association located at a naval activity.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7580.34 U.S.C. 527, (2d proviso).Mar. 4, 1911, ch. 23936 Stat. 1274The words “naval activity” are substituted for the words “navy yards and stations” to use present terminology and provide the same coverage.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7580 of this title
